message.content: The screen is a Sana AI dashboard with a left sidebar and main content area. The sidebar includes a logo, navigation (Chat, Workflows, Search, Meetings, More), a "Folders" section (Demo folder, View all), and a usage prompt ("10 meetings and 20 messages left...") with an "Upgrade" button. The main area has a top bar with "All" (dropdown), "Invite," and "Help" buttons. Below, a search bar ("What would you like to do?") is flanked by "Create" and "Sources" buttons, with a "Default" toggle. A list of AI-powered tasks (e.g., "Improve my doc in Google Docs") appears, plus a "Connect your apps" link. The color scheme is light (white/gray) with dark accents (black buttons, text). The bottom footer shows "Sana AI" and "curated by Mobbin."
